name: Kelly 32 leather handbag
description:
100% Authentic HERMÈS Bag

The iconic Hermès Kelly 32, crafted from refined Red H Box calfskin leather and adorned with luminous gold-tone hardware. Its timeless silhouette offers sophisticated elegance, ideal for both formal occasions and sophisticated everyday style. The polished Box calfskin develops a beautiful patina over time, a testament to the exceptional craftsmanship for which Hermès is renowned.

This Kelly is in excellent condition, showing only slight signs of wear, indicative of careful maintenance. The corners and edges have been lightly treated to enhance the leather.

• Condition: Very good, corners and edges slightly worn

• Series: Square M (1997)

• Accessories included: Shoulder strap only (no box, dust bag, lock/keys, or clochette)

• Size: Kelly 32, 32 x 23 x 10.5 cm
